summary: Agent DevKit usage and technical logs are stored globally under ~/.agent-devkit/data/logs as JSON Lines files named usage-YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl and technical-YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl.
facts: Each CLI command execution writes one usage event after the command completes.
Logs commands may also write usage events, so analysis can include observability activity itself.
The canonical usage event schema is agent-devkit.usage-log/v1.
